top_findings.summary: The Google Docs skill requests OAuth scopes for Google Calendar, Contacts, and Gmail APIs in addition to Docs and Drive APIs. Access to Calendar, Contacts, and Gmail is unrelated to its stated primary purpose of managing Google Docs documents (reading, writing, formatting, creation). While Drive API may be needed for file management and Sheets API for some integrations, requesting permissions for personal calendar events, contact lists, and email data constitutes excessive permission overreach, exposing sensitive user data unnecessary for core document operations.
